Your Unified Data Hub

Marketing data shouldn't live in ten different tabs. DashPort connects your Google Ads, Meta, Google Analytics and Jira into one unified dashboard — so you spend less time pulling reports and more time acting on them.

Connect

Google Ads, Meta, GA4 and Jira — live data, no manual pulls.

Build

Branded dashboards your clients actually understand.

Share

A link or a PDF. Clean, fast, professional.

Built for digital agencies and media buyers who are tired of broken connectors, manual exports, and paying more every time they onboard a new client. The first reporting tool that connects your ad performance and project execution in one view — finally answer the "why" behind every result.

Privacy Contact

Privacy Policy

Effective: March 2026 · getdashport.com

Who we are

getdashport.com (DashPort) is a marketing reporting platform. This policy covers data collected via our waitlist form.

What we collect

Name, email address, role, primary reporting platform, submission timestamp, and your consent choices.

How we use it

Exclusively to contact you about DashPort — early access, product updates, and launch pricing. Nothing else.

What we never do

We will never sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for any commercial or marketing purpose.

Your consent

Your submission with both boxes checked constitutes explicit, timestamped consent. You can withdraw at any time by emailing hello@getdashport.com or clicking unsubscribe in any email we send.

Your rights

You may access, correct, or delete your data at any time. Email hello@getdashport.com — we respond within 5 business days.

Data retention

Waitlist data is retained until you request deletion or 12 months after public launch, whichever comes first.

Security

Data is stored with encryption in transit and at rest using reputable infrastructure providers.

Tracking

This page uses no tracking cookies, analytics scripts, or advertising pixels.

Contact

hello@getdashport.com
